ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Amplifier, Filter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tested */,
  "test_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition */,
  "test_condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., Functional, Performance, Stress) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "test_setup" TEXT /* Description of the test setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Range of the parameter (e.g., 0-100, 100-200) */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the parameter */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for the parameter (e.g., ±5%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the parameter */,
  "test_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., Passed, Failed, In Progress) */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Test Report, Readme) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_revision_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_documents_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test result */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version (e.g., Bug Fix, Enhancement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., Active, Inactive, Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment usage event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was used */,
  "usage_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the usage of the equipment */,
  "usage_duration" TEXT /* Duration of equipment usage */,
  "usage_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who used the equipment */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES test_equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_equipment_usage_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the standard */,
  "standard_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was published */,
  "standard_status" TEXT /* Status of the standard (e.g., Active, Draft, Obsolete) */,
  "standard_issuer" TEXT /* Issuing organization of the standard */,
  "standard_revision_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was last revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_standard_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance was checked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "compliance_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who checked the compliance */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standard_compliance_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standard_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES test_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "environment_location" TEXT /* Location of the test environment */,
  "environment_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature of the test environment */,
  "environment_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity of the test environment */,
  "environment_pressure" TEXT /* Pressure of the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment usage event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was used */,
  "usage_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the usage of the environment */,
  "usage_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the usage */,
  "usage_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the usage */,
  "usage_pressure" TEXT /* Pressure during the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_usage_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_usage_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the test team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the test team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the team (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "team_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the team (e.g., Amplifiers, Filters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_team_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team assignment */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test team */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the team was assigned */,
  "assignment_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "assignment_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the assignment (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_team_assignments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES test_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_team_assignments_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Engineering, QA) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the test result (e.g., Desktop, Laptop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id")
)
